name: Indole-3-carbinol
description: Indole 3 Carbinol is under investigation in clinical trial NCT00033345 (Indole-3-Carbinol in Preventing Breast Cancer in Nonsmoking Women Who Are at High Risk For Breast Cancer).

interactions.name: Trastuzumab
interactions.description: Trastuzumab may increase the cardiotoxic activities of Indole-3-carbinol.

interactions.name: Paclitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Paclitaxel is combined with Indole-3-carbinol.

interactions.name: Docetaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Docetaxel is combined with Indole-3-carbinol.

interactions.name: Cabazitaxel
interactions.description: The risk or severity of adverse effects can be increased when Cabazitaxel is combined with Indole-3-carbinol.

interactions.name: Digoxin
interactions.description: Digoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Indole-3-carbinol.

interactions.description: Acetyldigitoxin may decrease the cardiotoxic activities of Indole-3-carbinol.
